empty_clients: Macaamiil lama helin. Macaamiishu waxay ka soo muuqdaan profiilada la kaydiyay ama marka lagu xiro dhaqdhaqaaq.
capture_subtitle: Sawirrada horta/dabadeed waxaa lagu kaydiyaa profiilka macmiilka.
cam_err_unavailable: API-ga kamaradda kuma jiro biraawsarkan. Isticmaal badhanka soo raridda bedelkeeda.
cam_err_denied: Ogolaanshaha kamaradda waa la diiday. Ka dhig mid la ogolaaday dejinta biraawsarkaaga, ama isticmaal badhanka soo raridda.
cam_err_notfound: Kamarad lama helin qalabkan. Isticmaal badhanka soo raridda si aad sawir ugu darto.
cam_err_inuse: Kamaradda waxaa horey u isticmaalaya app kale. Xir taas oo isku day mar kale.
cam_err_generic: Kamaradda lama bilaabi karin. Isticmaal badhanka soo raridda bedelkeeda.
notes_placeholder: Xasaasiyad, doorbidyo, xasaasiyadda maskaxda, fiirooyin wada-hadal…
